member.name: T:UrlShortener.NotificationsService.Consumers.UrlCreatedEventConsumer
member.summary: Consumes URL created events and sends Telegram notifications.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.NotificationsService.Consumers.UrlCreatedEventConsumer.#ctor(Telegram.Bot.ITelegramBotClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Consumes URL created events and sends Telegram notifications.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.NotificationsService.Consumers.UrlCreatedEventConsumer.Consume(MassTransit.ConsumeContext{UrlShortener.Messaging.Contracts.Events.UrlCreatedEvent})
member.summary: Handles UrlCreatedEvent messages and sends notification to configured Telegram chat.
